response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, experienced engineer with strong software craftsmanship credentials, but he does not meet the core mandatory requirements of this role. His professional C++ experience is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. His database experience lists MySQL and MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and he has no fixed-income or capital-markets domain background — RIDE Capital was TypeScript/Node fintech work, not investment banking. His recent decade has centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, making him a poor match for a specialized C++ capital-markets consulting engagement despite his overall seniority.
strengths: Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and notable open-source contributions
Broad polyglot background spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
concerns: Professional C++ experience is only ~7 months, versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no fixed-income or capital-markets domain knowledge
Recent career trajectory (TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, AI tooling) points away from the role's core stack
